title: Red Alert: China's External Propaganda Plan and Media Information Warfare
excerpt: A public forum examining China's overseas propaganda strategy and its implications for media integrity and information security in Taiwan and globally.

title: 2025 Sustainable and Constructive News Award
excerpt: The institute recognizes outstanding journalism that advances public understanding of sustainability and constructive reporting practices in Taiwan.

title: News Education and Media Literacy in the AI Era
excerpt: A symposium bringing together journalism educators, media practitioners, and researchers to discuss how artificial intelligence is reshaping newsrooms and journalism pedagogy.

title: Disinformation Attacks During the Presidential Election and Taiwan's Response
excerpt: Researchers and journalists convene to analyze patterns of election disinformation and discuss institutional and civic responses to protect Taiwan's information environment.
